heading: Tax treatment of nonqualified withdrawals

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in , a withdrawal from a fund that is not a qualified withdrawal shall be treated as a nonqualified withdrawal.section 53513 of this title
first from the ordinary income account;
second from the capital gain account; and
third from the capital account.
a nonqualified withdrawal from the ordinary income account shall be included in income as an item of ordinary income for the taxable year in which the withdrawal is made;

a nonqualified withdrawal from the capital gain account shall be included in income for the taxable year in which the withdrawal is made as an item of gain realized during that year from the disposition of an asset held for more than 6 months; and

children.label: A
children.text: no interest shall be payable under section 6601 of such Code () and no addition to the tax shall be payable under section 6651 of such Code ();26 U.S.C. 660126 U.S.C. 6651

children.label: B
children.text: interest on the amount of the additional tax attributable to an amount treated as a nonqualified withdrawal from the ordinary income account or the capital gain account shall be paid at the rate determined under subsection (d) from the last date prescribed for payment of the tax for the taxable year for which the amount was deposited in the fund; and

children.label: C
children.text: no interest shall be payable on amounts treated as withdrawn on a last-in-first-out basis under .section 53512 of this title
the money rates and investment yields for the calendar year immediately before the beginning of the taxable year; and
the money rates and investment yields for the calendar year 1970.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The following applicable percentage of any amount that remains in a capital construction fund at the close of the following specified taxable year following the taxable year for which the amount was deposited shall be treated as a nonqualified withdrawal:If the amount remains in the fund atthe close of the—The applicable percentage is—26th taxable year20 percent27th taxable year40 percent28th taxable year60 percent29th taxable year80 percent30th taxable year100 percent.

children.heading: .—Earnings
children.label: 2 .—Earnings
children.text: The earnings of a capital construction fund for any taxable year (except net gains) shall be treated under this subsection as an amount deposited for the taxable year.

children.heading: .—Contract for qualified withdrawal
children.label: 3 .—Contract for qualified withdrawal
children.text: Under paragraph (1), an amount shall not be treated as remaining in a capital construction fund at the close of a taxable year to the extent there is a binding contract at the close of the taxable year for a qualified withdrawal of the amount for an identified item for which the withdrawal may be made.

children.heading: .—Excess earnings
children.label: 4 .—Excess earnings
children.text: If the Secretary determines that the balance in a capital construction fund exceeds the amount appropriate to meet the vessel construction program objectives of the person that established the fund, the amount of the excess shall be treated as a nonqualified withdrawal under paragraph (1) unless the person develops appropriate program objectives within 3 years to dissipate the excess.

children.heading: .—Amounts in fund onjanuary 1, 1987
children.label: 5 .—Amounts in fund onjanuary 1, 1987
children.text: Under this subsection, amounts in a capital construction fund on , shall be treated as having been deposited in that fund on that date.January 1, 1987

children.label: A
children.text: excluding the withdrawal from gross income; and

children.label: B
children.text: increasing the tax imposed by chapter 1 of such Code by the product of the amount of the withdrawal and the highest tax rate specified in section 1 (or section 11 for a corporation) of such Code (, 11).26 U.S.C. 1

children.heading: .—Maximum tax rate
children.label: 2 .—Maximum tax rate
children.text: For that portion of a nonqualified withdrawal made from the capital gain account during a taxable year to which section 1(h) or 1201(a) of such Code (, 1201(a)) applies, the tax rate used under paragraph (1)(B) may not exceed 20 percent (or 34 percent for a corporation).126 U.S.C. 1(h)See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: that portion shall not be taken into account under paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: an amount equal to that portion shall be allowed as a deduction under section 172 of such Code () for the taxable year in which the withdrawal occurs.26 U.S.C. 172

children.heading: .—Coordination with deduction for net operating losses
children.label: 4 .—Coordination with deduction for net operating losses
children.text: A nonqualified withdrawal excluded from gross income under paragraph (1) shall be excluded in determining taxable income under section 172(b)(2) of such Code ().26 U.S.C. 172(b)(2)
